statement: Write a rustlite cartridge `frame(t: i32)` that paints the framebuffer as four equal quadrants of distinct solid colours. Query the framebuffer width and height from the host (do not hard-code 256/144), compute the half-width and half-height, then fill: top-left red (0xFF0000), top-right green (0x00FF00), bottom-left blue (0x0000FF), bottom-right white (0xFFFFFF). Present the frame.
constraints: Read dimensions via host::display::width() and host::display::height().
Exactly four fill_rect calls, one per quadrant.
